text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Greetings, dear Trainer! How farest thou?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Me? Why, I'm simply speaking like a true 
monarch of the turf should♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Pretty cool, doncha thin— 
I mean, magnificent, don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urgh… This is harder than I thought!
